name: refactory
description: Token-efficient codebase refactoring via MCP tools for Python and TypeScript projects.

interface.shortDescription: Refactor Python and TypeScript code through MCP tools.
interface.longDescription: Refactory provides Codex with token-efficient refactoring tools for moving modules, moving symbols, renaming symbols, and validating imports across Python and TypeScript projects.
defaultPrompt: Move this module and update imports.
Rename this symbol across the project.
